narrative_draft: Low-elevation Chrysothamnus viscidiflorus dwarf rabbitbrush steppe with Indian ricegrass on bare ground
Low-elevation Arctostaphylos-Purshia-Artemisia dryland scrub
Low-elevation Purshia tridentata-Mahonia repens-Rosa woodsii shrub gradient
Low-elevation Balsamorhiza-Wyethia mule-ear flower-field with Symphoricarpos shrubs
notes: Perfect recall on bright spring forb display

narrative_draft: Low-elevation Artemisia tridentata-Ericameria nauseosa sage shrubland with Phlox
Mid-elevation Artemisia-Arctostaphylos-Eriogonum-Symphoricarpos mixed shrub-grass mosaic
Mid-elevation Oxytropis-Geum triflorum-Potentilla short-stature forb meadow with Artemisia tridentata
Mid-elevation Festuca thurberi montane bunchgrass meadow with Erigeron speciosus and scattered Artemisia
Mid-elevation Artemisia cana low sagebrush with Potentilla hippiana on dry slopes
Mid-elevation Carex sp. sedge meadow with Caltha leptosepala and Deschampsia
Subalpine disturbed herbland: Taraxacum-Achillea-Fragaria-Eriogonum mix
notes: Taraxacum officinale prominent; suggests hay-cut or grazed pastures

narrative_draft: Subalpine Heterotheca villosa-Eriogonum umbellatum-Amelanchier rocky bench
Subalpine sparse-meadow: Heterotheca-Heliomeris-Bromopsis ciliata mix on rocky ground
Subalpine Veratrum tenuipetalum-Delphinium barbeyi tall-forb wet meadow
Subalpine Carex aquatilis-Juncus-Deschampsia wet sedge meadow with Aconitum columbianum
Subalpine Vaccinium cespitosum-Heliomeris-Helianthella shrub-forb mix on partly open ground
Subalpine moist Antennaria corymbosa-Sibbaldia-Salix wolfii willow-margin meadow
Dry Chrysothamnus depressus-Balsamorhiza sage steppe (East River 2018 sites lacking 2025 analogues)
notes: Mostly INFERRED 2018; wide DOY spread (mean 149, sd 25). Inference may not be reliable.

narrative_draft: Subalpine Festuca thurberi-Arnica mollis-Ligusticum mesic grass-forb meadow
Subalpine Ligusticum porteri tall-forb meadow generalist with Eucephalus, Thalictrum, Aquilegia, Bromopsis
notes: Mostly INFERRED 2018; canonical East River mesic forb meadow

narrative_draft: Subalpine Heterotheca villosa-Hymenoxys-Senecio crassulus dry rocky meadow
Upper subalpine Mertensia ciliata-Heracleum-Veratrum tall-forb wet drainage
Upper subalpine Caltha leptosepala-Carex aquatilis snowmelt wetland with Pedicularis groenlandica
Late-melt Carex saxatilis sedge wetland with Arnica mollis and Caltha
Late-melt Vaccinium cespitosum subalpine scrub with Bistorta and Calamagrostis canadensis
